title: Prominent Palestinian prisoner Marwan Barghouti assaulted three times in a month, family says
summary_full: The Israeli Prison Service says the allegation that Barghouti was subjected to physical violence by prison guards are "false and baseless".
summary_public: The Israeli Prison Service says the allegation that Barghouti was subjected to physical violence by prison guards are "false and baseless".

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Palestinian prisoner Marwan Barghouti assaulted three times
